# Calculator Tools Functionality Test
# Tests all calculator tools with various inputs

# Build the calculator server binary
go build -o mcp-calculator-server .

# Test all calculator tools
exec mcp-calculator-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"add","a":10,"b":5}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"multiply","a":7,"b":8}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"divide","a":15,"b":3}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"sqrt","x":16}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"power","x":2,"y":3}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"sin","x":1.5708}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"statistics","arguments":{"numbers":[1,2,3,4,5]}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_units","arguments":{"value":100,"from_unit":"celsius","to_unit":"fahrenheit"}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_units","arguments":{"value":1,"from_unit":"kilometers","to_unit":"miles"}},"id":11}
EOF

# Verify basic arithmetic results
stdout '"result":15'
stdout '"operation":"add"'
stdout '"result":56'
stdout '"operation":"multiply"'
stdout '"result":5'
stdout '"operation":"divide"'

# Verify advanced math results
stdout '"result":4'
stdout '"operation":"sqrt"'
stdout '"result":8'
stdout '"operation":"power"'
stdout '"result":1'
stdout '"operation":"sin"'

# Verify statistics results
stdout '"count":5'
stdout '"sum":15'
stdout '"mean":3'
stdout '"median":3'
stdout '"min":1'
stdout '"max":5'

# Verify unit conversion results
stdout '"converted_value":212'
stdout '"conversion_type":"temperature"'
stdout '"converted_value":0.621371'
stdout '"conversion_type":"length"'
